title: wyred contract v0 — layer-1 intent document (.l1.json)
description: Descriptive schema for the layer-1 intent doc, extracted from harness schema_l1.to_json (precedence: goldens > harness > EMIT_CONTRACT Part B/C prose). Optionality mirrors _put (emit-only-when-non-default): the six keys layer/series/roles/rails/grounds/allocation are always emitted; forked_from/scopes/bonds/buses/pools/invariants/escalations/attrs appear only when non-empty/non-null. Per-object optional fields are likewise elided at their default. Closed vocabularies encoded as enums: CHOSEN_BY, ALLOC_STATES, DECISION_CLASSES (in common.defs.json), INVARIANT_KINDS, GROUND_KINDS, GROUND_ROLES; Role.kind and every iface (capability/demand/bus/pool.provides) are left OPEN per finding F2. forked_from here is the {series, reason} OBJECT (F4). additionalProperties:false everywhere except the free attrs dicts.

attrs.description: free-form salient-property dict; the one open shape (additionalProperties intentionally unconstrained)

capability.description: Something a role PROVIDES (schema_l1._capability_to_json). iface always emitted; volts/rail/attrs emit-only-when-set. iface is OPEN (F2).

demand.description: Something a role NEEDS (schema_l1._demand_to_json). id/iface always emitted; volts/bus/qty(default 1)/default/attrs emit-only-when-non-default. iface is OPEN (F2).

role.description: An abstract part/module (schema_l1._role_to_json). id/kind always emitted; scope(default "")/capabilities/demands/attrs emit-only-when-non-default. kind is OPEN vocabulary (F2).

scope.description: A named nested lexical scope (schema_l1._scope_to_json). id always emitted; parent(default "") emit-only-when-set.

rail.description: A scoped, functionally named power rail (schema_l1._rail_to_json). name/volts always emitted; scope/attrs emit-only-when-set.

ground.description: A 0V return tagged by kind+role (schema_l1._ground_to_json). name always emitted; kind(default "ground")/role(default "none")/scope/attrs emit-only-when-non-default. kind/role are the closed GROUND_KINDS/GROUND_ROLES vocabularies.

bond.description: An authored star-point / net-tie join between grounds (schema_l1._bond_to_json). name/joins always emitted; attrs emit-only-when-set.

bus.description: A shared multi-drop interface instance (schema_l1._bus_to_json). name/iface always emitted; scope/attrs emit-only-when-set. iface is OPEN (F2).

pool.description: A declared swap group of interchangeable units (schema_l1._pool_to_json). name/role/provides/unit_count/port_signature always emitted; attrs emit-only-when-set. provides is an OPEN iface (F2).

invariant_decl.description: A layer-1 invariant declaration over intent-level references (schema_l1._invariant_decl_to_json). kind/subjects always emitted; inputs/attrs emit-only-when-set. kind is the closed INVARIANT_KINDS vocabulary. NOTE: distinct from the layer-2 invariant (l2.schema.json) whose anchors are concrete (refdes, pin) node pairs.

escalation.description: A ladder-rung-4 escalation WITH explanation (schema_l1._escalation_to_json). code/msg always emitted; subjects/conflict/relaxation emit-only-when-non-default. F7: this rich-object encoding is the l1/records form; the layer-2 escalations field is a plain STRING array (l2.schema.json).
